language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose your language. It applies across the app, emails and notifications.

common.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.feedbackDesc: Report a bug or request a feature

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.intro: Personalise the look. Changes apply instantly and are saved to your account, so they follow you on every device.

muscles.title: Muscles
muscles.intro: Recovery shows fatigue from recent training; Strength shows your level per muscle from your lifts.
muscles.tapRecovery: Tap a muscle to see fatigue, recovery time, and report soreness.
muscles.tapStrength: Tap a muscle to see your strength level and how to reach the next tier.
muscles.topTier: Top tier — you're an Olympian on this lift. 🏆
muscles.noStandard: No strength standard for this muscle yet — it's tracked by recovery and volume.
muscles.needBodyweight: Log your bodyweight, then a heavy {movement}, to see your strength level.
muscles.needData: No data yet — log a heavy {movement} (a set that becomes a PR) to unlock your strength level.

feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.placeholder: Tell us what you'd love, what's broken, or what could be better… (5+ characters)

email.ignore: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.

INVITE.subject: You're invited to {brand}
INVITE.heading: Welcome aboard
INVITE.body: An admin invited you to join. Click below to set up your account.

EMAIL_VERIFY.subject: Verify your email for {brand}
EMAIL_VERIFY.heading: Confirm your email
EMAIL_VERIFY.body: Confirm this address to finish setting up your account.

LOGIN_LINK.subject: Your {brand} sign-in link
LOGIN_LINK.heading: Sign in
LOGIN_LINK.body: Use this link to sign in. It expires in 15 minutes and can be used once.

PASSWORD_RESET.subject: Reset your {brand} password
PASSWORD_RESET.heading: Reset password
PASSWORD_RESET.body: Click below to choose a new password. This link expires in 30 minutes.

EMAIL_CHANGE.subject: Confirm your new email for {brand}
EMAIL_CHANGE.heading: Confirm new email
EMAIL_CHANGE.body: Confirm this new address to update your account email.

email.smtpTestBody: This is a test email. Your SMTP settings work.

streakRisk.title: Keep your streak alive 🔥
streakRisk.body: Train today to keep your streak going.

streakReset.title: Streak reset
streakReset.body: Your daily streak reset — start a new one today.

leaguePromote.title: Promoted! 🎉
leaguePromote.body: You finished #{rank} and were promoted to {tier}.

leagueRelegate.title: League result
leagueRelegate.body: You finished #{rank} and were relegated to {tier}.
